_comment: Captured 2026-07-17 from __NEXT_DATA__.props.pageProps.topSpecialOffers on https://www.leasingoptions.co.uk/car-leasing/special-offers (two entries, verbatim). This is where listing-card lease profiles live — the card DOM shows only a headline monthly. Each entry: vehicleRef (matches the /<ref>/vehicle segment of the card's stretched-link href), and a deals[] array with contractType 2 = Personal (PCH) and 1 = Business (use PCH). NOTE: `term` is in YEARS (2 = 24 months). initial rental £ = initialRentalMonths * monthlyPrice. Processing fee is NOT here (site-wide £399.99 constant, DOM-only). Pinned for tests: Cupra Terramar PCH -> term 24mo, initial 2567.28, monthly 213.94, +399.99 fee -> total 7887.89, effective 328.66.
